compressed_regions.summary: Multiple feature pairs show near-perfect pairwise correlations (several exactly 1.0, one at 0.9993), indicating strong linear dependencies among packet-size, segment-size, subflow, and flag-count features.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Fwd Header Length|Fwd Header Length.1|Fwd PSH Flags|SYN Flag Count|Fwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Fwd Segment Size|RST Flag Count|ECE Flag Count|Total Backward Packets|Subflow Bwd Packets|Total Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Packets|Total Length of Bwd Packets|Subflow Bwd Bytes|Total Length of Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Bytes|Packet Length Mean|Average Packet Size
notes: e13-e22 report correlation metrics across these pairs

compressed_regions.summary: A set of bulk-rate and several flag/count features are effectively constant across the partition (unique_values = 1, very low cardinality ratio).

locality.scope_value: Bwd Avg Bulk Rate|Bwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Bwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Bwd PSH Flags|Bwd URG Flags|CWE Flag Count|Fwd Avg Bulk Rate|Fwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Fwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Fwd URG Flags
notes: e23-e32 report unique_values=1 and cardinality_ratio=1e-05 for these features

compressed_regions.summary: Several packet-size and segment-size metrics plus destination port show strong class-conditioned distributional differences (high variance ratios, unequal unique_values_by_class, and high JS divergence for port distributions).

locality.scope_value: Average Packet Size|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Bwd Packet Length Max|Bwd Packet Length Mean|Bwd Packet Length Std|Destination Port
notes: e33 reports class-conditioned distribution metrics for Destination Port

compressed_regions.summary: Partition-level metadata: non-negligible duplicated rows, mild class imbalance, and a small ranked set of top features identified in the overview.

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Average Packet Size appears frequently in feature lists and shows class-conditioned variance metrics.

notes: e7 (top rank) and e8 (variance_ratio) reference this feature

preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Repeated presence in top_feature_rank and distributional evidence suggests representational importance in overview.

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Presence of 729 duplicated rows in the partition.
preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Duplicate rows can affect summary statistics, correlation computations, and unique-value counts; preserved for structural caution.

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Destination Port shows high divergence between BENIGN and DDoS distributions (DDoS dominant_ratio=1.0, js_divergence~0.7315).
preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Strong class-conditioned distributional signal preserved as it may reflect concentrated port usage in one class.

unresolved_tensions.description: Apparent strong feature redundancy (near-perfect correlations) coexists with features that exhibit strong class-conditioned representation differences; the relation between redundancy and representational signal is unresolved.

A group of features is effectively constant (unique_values=1) while other related features show high class-conditioned variance; unclear if constants are genuine signals, defaults, or measurement artifacts.
